query: just shipped a new rust crate to crates.io called `configula` — does yaml/toml config merging. the only docs right now are cargo docs and a 50-line README. need proper structured docs before I announce it to the community

need to document the architecture of our payment service before my team lead review on friday. it has a stripe webhook handler, a fraud detection module that calls our ML api, and a postgres-backed ledger. need something that explains how the components fit together

we inherited a node repo from another team. there's a `docs/` folder with like 20 markdown files just dumped in there — setup.md, api.md, config.md, deploy.md etc. no index, no navigation. we're trying to get it organized
my SUMMARY.md keeps going out of sync with the actual files in docs/ — half the links 404 and the hierarchy doesn't match the folder structure. been meaning to fix this for weeks
saw that GitBook auto-generates llms.txt for AI context. how do I structure my docs so the AI summary is actually useful?

new engineers on my team spend 2-3 days just getting their env set up because the docs are outdated or nonexistent. it's a Go service with postgres + redis, deployed on k8s. need to write up proper docs

our monorepo has 6 packages — auth, billing, notifications, core, api, admin. currently one big README.md at root tries to explain everything and it's become unmanageable. we need to restructure the docs
we have an mdBook setup for our rust project (book.toml, src/SUMMARY.md) and want to switch to GitBook. can you help migrate the structure and convert the syntax?
before I refactor the auth module, read through docs/authentication.md and the source code and give me a summary of how it currently works
line 23 in docs/getting-started.md says `npm start` but we switched to `pnpm` last month. quick one-line fix
add JSDoc comments to all the exported functions in src/api/client.ts — parameter types, return types, brief descriptions for each
I wrote a small CLI tool called `imgcrunch` that compresses images. need a README for the GitHub repo — just install instructions, usage flags, and a couple of examples
our REST API is missing docs for the new /payments/refund endpoint. can you update the OpenAPI spec? it takes a charge_id, amount, and optional reason field
help me write a technical design doc for the new rate limiting feature — needs to cover the problem statement, proposed solution, alternatives we considered, and rollout plan
review PR #247 — it adds GitBook docs for the new billing module. let me know if the structure looks right or if anything's missing before we merge
generate release notes for our v3.0 release from the PR titles since v2.5 — about 40 PRs. should go in CHANGELOG.md
set up Storybook for our design system. we have 30+ React components that need stories and prop documentation
write a Confluence page explaining our deployment process — covers dev, staging, and prod environments, who approves deployments, and how to roll back. it's for the engineering wiki
